about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: Junior FullStack Developer and Computer Science student with experience in startups and early-stage products. I started as a Frontend Developer and evolved into a FullStack role.
about.paragraph2: Currently working on a product under a vesting model as CPO, leading the Frontend and UX/UI area while also contributing to the backend with Node.js and PostgreSQL. I consider myself self-taught, analytical, and focused on creating real impact from day one.

experience.title: Experience
experience.meliorarDescription: Responsible for product strategy and Frontend leadership.
experience.meliorarFullDescription:
Main responsibilities:

- Product Strategy and Roadmap: Define what to build, when and why by managing the product roadmap.

- User and Market Research: Understand customer needs, analyze competitors and represent the voice of the user within the team.

- UX/UI Design: Lead product functional definition and supervise the design process to ensure a consistent user experience.

- Product Metrics: Define and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs) to support data-driven decision making.

- Frontend Lead: Responsible for defining the frontend technology stack, building the architecture of the application and making technical decisions aligned with the product vision.
experience.dataAnalystDescription: Data processing and analysis using Python in Google Colab.
experience.dataAnalystFullDescription:
As a Data Analyst I participated in data collection, cleaning and transformation using Python in Google Colab.

- Reading and processing CSV files to convert them into structured DataFrames using pandas.

- Creation of derived columns and specific calculations to enrich datasets.

- Exporting results to Excel files so different teams could work with organized data.

- Generation of JSON files used in automated Cypress tests for the frontend.

- Periodic preparation and delivery of Excel reports to the Marketing team ensuring updated information in each data update cycle.

- Development of reports including charts and written data analysis used to support marketing decision making.
experience.fullstackDescription: Participated in the modernization and development of a tourism analytics dashboard platform.
experience.fullstackFullDescription:
Project V1 – Modernization and Maintenance (Vue 2, Quasar, TypeScript, NestJS)
Migration of the application from Vue 2 to Vue 3 including TypeScript to improve maintainability.

- REST API consumption using Axios.

- End-to-end automated testing with Cypress validating:
- Main forms
- Data visualization screens
- Critical user flows defined by the team

Project V2 – New Architecture and Feature Development (Vue 3, Pinia, Firebase, XState, Vitest)

- Full development using Vue 3 + Composition API
- Global state management with Pinia
- Navigation with Vue Router
- Firebase Authentication integration
- Interactive dashboards with vue-echarts
- Unit testing with Vitest

Responsible for developing the new Destination section:
- Creation of the reusable Data Snippet component
- Integration of multiple data sources
- Data visualizations using ECharts

Backend:
- Development of NestJS endpoints connected to MySQL
- Implementation of CRUD operations

Methodologies:
- Git and GitHub using GitFlow
- Feature branches and Pull Requests
- Sprint planning and task tracking in Jira
experience.frontendFullDescription:
Responsible for the full development of three websites including responsive design.

- Implementation using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and Tailwind.

- Adapting layouts for different screen sizes ensuring both mobile and desktop compatibility.

- Collaborative development using Git and GitHub with frequent commits to maintain an organized workflow.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm always interested in new opportunities, collaborations and exciting projects.
